next.handoff_note: Resume flow in syncEngine drops yolo by passing undefined into rpcGateway.spawnSession(...). Runner only appends --yolo when options.yolo===true, and Claude only enters bypassPermissions when started with --yolo/--dangerously-skip-permissions. Fix by mapping stored session.permissionMode back into resume spawn args, then optionally applySessionConfig after session becomes active.

questions: Với non-Claude flavors, có muốn preserve full permission mode khi resume hay chỉ preserve behavior tương đương yolo?
